steps.title: Identify what 'featured' describes in this context
steps.content: The photograph "featured" a portrait of Great-Great-Grandmother Rosita as a young woman. The word describes what the photo visually showed or presented.

steps.title: Match the target meaning
steps.content:
The blank substitutes for "featured" in: the photo ______ a portrait of Great-Great-Grandmother Rosita. Test each choice:

A) ignored = paid no attention to. "The photo ignored a portrait" contradicts the act of showing something—a photo cannot ignore its own subject. Fails.

B) approved = officially accepted or judged favorably. "The photo approved a portrait" would mean the photo evaluated or endorsed the portrait—photos don't make judgments. Fails.

C) questioned = expressed doubt about. "The photo questioned a portrait" implies the photo challenged the image—photos don't question. Fails.

D) displayed = showed or exhibited visually. "The photo displayed a portrait of Rosita" correctly describes what a photograph does—it shows a visual image. Correct.
